sourcesContent:
export const C = {
  teal:"#1D9E75",tealL:"#E1F5EE",
  amber:"#BA7517",amberL:"#FAEEDA",
  blue:"#185FA5",blueL:"#EEF4FD",
  bg:"#f8f8f6",border:"#e8e8e8",text:"#111111"
};

export const GIGS_DEFAULT = [
  {id:"g1",venueId:null,name:"Arbor Brewing Co.",type:"Brewery",city:"Bangalore",night:"Friday evenings",pay:"₹3,000–5,000",genreNeed:"Acoustic / Indie",desc:"Chill acoustic set, 2hrs. PA arranged by us. Mixed young crowd.",posted:"2 days ago",applicants:[],sponsors:[],slots:["Tattoo studio","Craft beer brand","Merch table"],duration:"2hrs"},
  {id:"g2",venueId:null,name:"AntiSocial Mumbai",type:"Music Venue",city:"Mumbai",night:"Wednesday nights",pay:"₹8,000–12,000",genreNeed:"Rock / Metal / Alt",desc:"Full stage + sound. High-energy crowd. Great exposure for full bands.",posted:"1 day ago",applicants:[],sponsors:[{brand:"Bira 91",amount:"₹15,000"}],slots:["Streetwear pop-up","Tattoo studio","Vinyl seller"],duration:"3hrs"},
  {id:"g3",venueId:null,name:"The Humming Tree",type:"Music Venue",city:"Bangalore",night:"Saturday nights",pay:"₹5,000–8,000",genreNeed:"Indie / Experimental",desc:"Bangalore's premier indie venue. Full production. Discerning crowd.",posted:"4 days ago",applicants:[],sponsors:[{brand:"boAt Audio",amount:"₹10,000"}],slots:["Vinyl seller","Zine shop","Streetwear"],duration:"2.5hrs"},
  {id:"g4",venueId:null,name:"Koramangala Social",type:"Bar",city:"Bangalore",night:"Thursday nights",pay:"₹2,000–4,000",genreNeed:"Jazz / Soul",desc:"Smooth vibes, seated crowd. Duo or trio preferred.",posted:"3 days ago",applicants:[],sponsors:[],slots:["Coffee brand","Photography studio"],duration:"2hrs"},
];

export const DECK = [
  {n:1,bg:"#f0faf5",accent:C.teal,title:"We're bringing\nthe scene back.",sub:"GetMeGig — India's live music culture platform",tag:"Pre-seed · 2025"},
  {n:2,bg:"#fdf5ee",accent:C.amber,title:"The problem.",points:["50,000+ great artists. Zero structured path to gigs.","Venues find talent through WhatsApp forwards.","Brands want grassroots music crowds but have no entry point.","Tattoo studios, streetwear, vinyl — no event to orbit around.","The scene exists. The infrastructure doesn't."]},
  {n:3,bg:"#eef4fd",accent:C.blue,title:"The solution.",points:["Venues build full profiles — sound, tech, space. Artists know exactly what they're walking into.","Artists build portfolios — videos, photos, bios. Venues screen talent properly.","Brands and cultural partners activate around every gig.","No middlemen. No WhatsApp chaos. One platform."]},
  {n:4,bg:"#f0faf5",accent:C.teal,title:"Four parties.\nOne platform.",parties:[{icon:"🎸",l:"Artist",d:"Build a portfolio. Apply to gigs. Get paid."},{icon:"🏠",l:"Venue",d:"Full profile with sound & tech. Post needs. Screen artists."},{icon:"🏷️",l:"Sponsor",d:"Reach exactly the right crowd at the right gig."},{icon:"🛍️",l:"Culture",d:"Tattoo studios, streetwear, vinyl — activate at events."}]},
  {n:5,bg:"#fafaf0",accent:C.amber,title:"The market.",stats:[{n:"50,000+",l:"Artists in India"},{n:"12,000+",l:"Live music venues"},{n:"₹4,200 Cr",l:"Live events market"},{n:"0",l:"Dominant platforms"}]},
  {n:6,bg:"#eef4fd",accent:C.blue,title:"How we make money.",revenue:[{s:"Venue listing",d:"₹299 per gig post",w:"Venue"},{s:"Artist commission",d:"₹150–200 per confirmed gig",w:"Artist"},{s:"Sponsorship cut",d:"15–20% of brand deal",w:"Sponsor"},{s:"Cultural partner slot",d:"₹500–2,000 per event",w:"Partner"}]},
  {n:7,bg:"#fdf5ee",accent:C.amber,title:"Why now.",points:["Post-COVID café & brewery culture in Indian metros has exploded.","A new generation of college bands is better than ever — and broke.","D2C brands need hyperlocal event marketing with no platform to do it.","Gigstart tried this and stalled. The window is wide open.","We're moving fast, city by city, starting Bangalore."]},
  {n:8,bg:"#f0faf5",accent:C.teal,title:"The mission.",quote:"India has the music.\nWe're building the culture around it.",body:"Every gig we power is a scene being rebuilt. A college band getting their first real paycheque. A tattoo studio finding its crowd. A brand actually belonging somewhere."},
  {n:9,bg:"#f8f8f6",accent:"#555",title:"What we're raising.",ask:[{l:"Round",v:"Pre-seed"},{l:"Amount",v:"₹40–60 Lakhs"},{l:"Use of funds",v:"Tech, city launches, BD"},{l:"Launch city",v:"Bangalore (Month 1)"},{l:"Year 1 target",v:"500 gigs · 3 cities"}]},
  {n:10,bg:"#f0faf5",accent:C.teal,title:"Let's build\nthe scene.",sub:"getmegig.co.in",contact:"founder@getmegig.co.in"},
];
